title: Change my address – Immigration and citizenship - Canada.ca
content:
You only need to update your address if you have an active application in progress with us.
If we don’t have your current email or mailing address
- important documents could be delayed or lost
- your application may be refused or considered abandoned
Answer a few questions to find out how to change your address for your
      application for a permanent resident (PR) card, citizenship, immigration
      and
      temporary residence.
Your result is
          loading...
If you’re experiencing issues or none of the options above apply to you, you can use the web form to update your address .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
